data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: A security framework requiring all users, whether in or outside the organization's network, to be authenticated and authorized.

data.title: Encryption
data.description: Netflix employs encryption for data at rest and in transit to protect sensitive information.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Utilizes advanced threat detection systems to identify and mitigate potential cyber threats in real-time.

data.title: Security Incident Response
data.description: Security teams and protocols in place to respond promptly to any detected security incidents.
data.technical_spec: Incident Response Plan, Forensic Analysis Tools

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits and penetration tests to ensure system integrity and compliance.
